The '''''Mathayus''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Coy]], and later Admiral [[Dezsetes]]. Its [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] was [[Atali]].

==History==
In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], it transported [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to [[Dargulli/Legends|Dargulli]] on a mission to kill a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]-wielding criminal.

Then-[[Second officer/Legends|Second Officer]] Dezsetes arranged a false distress signal from a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] ship near [[Yorn Skot]] during the trip, hoping Darth Vader would enter it. The ship, loaded with explosives, was an attempt on Vader's life as part of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Trachta]]'s plans to seize control over the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Unfortunately for Dezsetes, Vader sent [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Atali]] on board instead. The following explosion badly damaged the ''Mathayus''{{'}} hangar bay, but it was eventually repaired.

Command of ''Mathayus'' was given to Dezsetes after the death of Admiral Coy. Coy had in fact been murdered in his quarters when Dezsetes determined he could not be trusted to join the coup. When Dezsetes made a move to eliminate Vader, he and his cadre of loyal [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were killed by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 2|''Empire'' 2]] {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
